text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by to watch one of Mejiro Palmer's dance
lessons.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wahey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey! Woo!
choice_data_list: Is this... part of the lesson?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Heyo! How's it going?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We're not playing hooky or anything, 'kay? We
just needed to shake things up.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Palmer was feeling down in the dumps, so I
decided to cheer her up the Helios way! Can I get
a "Wahey-hey"?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's no biggie. I just can't get the
choreography down right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The song we're working on is, like, super hard, and I keep messing up the steps.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure I'm perf once it's go time on stage,
so no worries!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I should probably get back to it, though.
choice_data_list:
Don't overthink it and just dance for fun, like
you just were doing.

Let's think about the meaning behind the
moves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? Are you telling me to just let loose?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Your moves looked so carefree and fluid.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That's a good point! Dancing is about feeling, and what's better than feelin' great?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh. I guess I got so hung up on being perfect
that it started messin' with my vibes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, then! Who cares about messing up,
anyway?! I'm gonna dance 'cause I like it!
Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Those moves are straight fire, girl!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I get the feeling I'm dancing way better
than I did before we took a break!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Palmer is reminded of the pure fun
that comes with dancing and overcomes her
negative mindset.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah. All the moves have a meaning, don't
they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if I can get a better feel of what the song's
about before trying to memorize the moves,
things'll be easier...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Are you thinking what I'm thinking? 'Cause I'm
thinking it's time for some karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah! The best way to mull over song lyrics
is while you're singing them with your whole chest!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey! That's what I'm talkin' 'bout! C'mon,
what're we still doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wahey! You come with us too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Mejiro Palmer deepens her
understanding of the song and masters the dance
in no time.
